sections.title: Opening Canon
entries: The playable story opens with Sherward's morning memory before direct control.
The first conflict is a sharp argument between Sherward and his father Sebastian.
Adalin remains a core line of the main arc from the opening onward.

sections.title: Codex Book Structure
entries: Characters records key people tied to the main narrative and local encounters.
Factions tracks powers influencing the region and political pressure.
Locations stores discovered places, routes, and notable landmarks.
Events captures major transitions and player-facing world moments.

sections.title: World Briefing
entries: Sharuan is split into castle heights, trade town, and southern docks.
The hill roads and forest routes are safer by day and volatile at night.
River travel and coastal approach connect inland roads to the sea port.

sections.title: Combat Notes
entries: Light attacks maintain pressure, heavy attacks open guarded targets.
Parry windows are short; block first, counter only on clean reads.
Movement and stamina control decide most early duels.

sections.title: Mounts and Travel
entries: Mount hints appear near valid horses, carriages, and ships.
Dismount checks use safe placement to avoid clipping and fall-through.
Ship travel is currently coastal and river-estuary only.

sections.title: Controls Reminder
entries: I opens Inventory, Map, Skills, and Journal tabs.
F5/F6/F7 save to slots, Shift+F5/F6/F7 load from slots.
F8 restarts the main tutorial; Shift+F8 restarts full training.
